q: They (have) saved up some money. They (buy) a new house soon.
a: They have saved up some money. They are buying a new house soon.

q: The water (boil) now. Let's make some tea.
a: The water is boiling now. Let's make some tea.

q: Listen to them. They (shout) in the room.
a: Listen to them. They are shouting in the room.

q: Please shut the window. The rain (beat) in.
a: Please shut the window. The rain is beating in.

q: It's a lovely day. The birds (sing) away.
a: It's a lovely day. The birds are singing away.

q: The tap still (run). Please turn it off.
a: The tap still (run). Please turn it off.

q: It is time to go home. The pupils (pack) up their things.
a: It is time to go home. The pupils are packing up their things.

q: Someone (knock) at the door. Please see who it is.
a: Someone is knocking at the door. Please see who it is.

q: Don't get down from the bus yet. It still (move).
a: Don't get down from the bus yet. It still moving.

q: The phone (ring). Go and answer it.
a: The phone is ringing. Go and answer it.

q: Look at the children. They (play) happily in the garden.
a: Look at the children. They are playing happily in the garden.

q: Father has come home early. He (take) us to the cinema tonight.
a: Father has come home early. He is taking us to the cinema tonight.

q: The men (rest): They (not work) now.
a: The men are resting. They are not working now.

q: I have given mother my torn shirt. She (mend) it for me this afternoon.
a: I have given mother my torn shirt. She is mending it for me this afternoon.

q: I'm ill. I (not go) to school today.
a: I'm ill. I am not going to school today.

q: Do hurry up! Your friends (wait) for you outside.
a: Do hurry up! Your friends are waiting for you outside.

q: The dog (bark) fiercely because there is a stranger at the gate.
a: The dog is barking fiercely because there is a stranger at the gate.

q: Can you hear what the speaker (say)?
a: Can you hear what the speaker saying?

q: It's going to rain. The people (hurry) home.
a: It's going to rain. The people ar hurrying home.

q: It is a hot day. The sun (shine) brightly.
a: It is a hot day. The sun is shining brightly.

q: Plase be quiet. The children (sleep) upstairs.
a: Plase be quiet. The children are sleeping upstairs.

q: Weimei come just now. She said she is bringing (bring) some magazines over tonight.
a: Weimei come just now. She said she is bringing some magazines over tonight.

q: You can see the moon now. The clouds (not hide) it.
a: You can see the moon now. The clouds are not hiding it.

q: Listen! Someone (call) for help.
a: Listen! Someone is calling for help.

q: She (read). She (not cook) in the kitchen.
a: She is reading. She is not cooking in the kitchen.

q: Switch off the radio. I (try) to read this book.
a: Switch off the radio. I am trying to read this book.

q: Someone (call) for you outside. Open the window and see who it is.
a: Someone is calling for you outside. Open the window and see who it is.

q: Look! The sun (rise) abouve those hills.
a: Look! The sun is rising abouve those hills.

q: Don't disturb him. He (do) his homework.
a: Don't disturb him. He is doing his homework.

q: That road is under repair. The buses (not run) along it today.
a: That road is under repair. The buses are not running along it today.
